name: Nashi Beef with Macadamia
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chokos under running cold water, remove the peel and discard the core. Cut into cubes and drop into boiling salted water for 5 minutes. Drain and cool.
2. Cut nashi into similar-sized cubes. Squeeze over lemon juice and combine with cooked chokos.
3. Heat oil in a wok and stir fry beef for a couple of minutes. Cook in several batches to allow the beef to brown. Remove the beef with a slotted spoon and fry the spring onions, garlic, ginger, and macadamias on the same oil and juices for 1 minute.
4. Combine the cold water, corn flour, soy sauce, and chilli sauce in a bowl. Add to the pan along with the beef and stir until thickened.
5. Add the chokos and nashi, stirring just to mix. Serve immediately. Garnish with sesame seeds.
